headline: Is NextEra Energy (NEE) Fairly Priced After Strong One Year Share Price Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether NextEra Energy is still fairly priced at around US$92.71, you are not alone. Many investors are asking if the current share price matches the underlying value. Over shorter periods the stock has been mixed, with a 1.4% decline over the last 7 days, a 5.5% gain over 30 days and returns of 14.6% year to date, 33.3% over 1 year, 36.0% over 3 years and 48.9% over 5 years. Recent headlines around US utilities and renewable power have focused on interest rate...
